runtime.dependencies: standard-library-only; git required for extension installation

extensions.name: UI UX Pro Max
extensions.best_for: marketing landing pages, dashboards, app frontends, style mockups; 67 styles + 161 palettes + 57 font pairings + 161 industry rules + 99 UX guidelines; design system generator with pre-delivery checklist; serves landing-page / app-frontend / style-mockup routes (mode switched by prompt)

extensions.name: Taste Skill (Leonxlnx)
extensions.best_for: style-mockup route only — multi-child-Skill repo; delegate brutalist-skill for brutalist/swiss aesthetics (hard mechanical + Swiss type + sharp contrast + 1-10 dials), soft-skill for luxury(soft/calm-premium) aesthetics (softer contrast + spring motion). Together with premium-design-skill (relay-mode) covers 4 of 8 community style gaps. Other child Skills (redesign-skill / brandkit / minimalist-skill) remain in boundary.md §6 relay mode.

artifact_destinations.existing_project_optimization: the target IndieArk project directory (e.g. 20009-feedback/, 1-showcase/) — no copy kept inside this skill

inspiration_sources: Leonxlnx/taste-skill (vendored as extension; style-mockup route only)
